sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 0), (3, 5);
UPDATE test_table SET value = 10 WHERE isZeroOrNull(value);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE isZeroOrNull(value);
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE isZeroOrNull(value) AND id > 1;
